summary: Implemented Phase 3B. Prediction compatibility is now decided by a pure client helper before WASM adapter initialization, with `unsupported-local-faction` recorded only when the local active player is on an unsupported faction. AI seats remain Kriegsia-only in the observable lobby/start contracts, and the phase plus lifecycle matrix are marked updated/done.
verification: Live AI integration was attempted, but the sandbox refused local server bind on 127.0.0.1:8093 with Operation not permitted, so tests/ai_integration.mjs was not executed end-to-end here.
gameplay_impact: No intended gameplay change. Normal Kriegsia matches keep prediction when version/build metadata is compatible; unsupported future local factions fail closed without disabling prediction for Kriegsia players just because an opponent has an unsupported faction.
next_executor_notes: Phase 3C can proceed. `addAi` remains team-only; the AI test now allows either rejecting a hand-built unsupported faction field or ignoring it while seating only a Kriegsia AI. Client prediction support is centralized in `client/src/prediction_compatibility.js` and currently supports only `kriegsia`.
manual_test_notes: Start a normal Kriegsia match with prediction enabled and confirm prediction still becomes available. If local server binding is available, run `RTS_WS=ws://127.0.0.1:<port>/ws node tests/ai_integration.mjs` against a running server to exercise the live AI lobby/start path.
